title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/cgroups to v0.0.2 - autoclosed
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/cgroups](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups) | `v0.0.1` -> `v0.0.2` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.1/v0.0.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.1/v0.0.2?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/cgroups (github.com/opencontainers/cgroups)</summary>

### [`v0.0.2`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/releases/tag/v0.0.2)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.1...v0.0.2)

Added:

-   CPU burst stats. ([#​11](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/issues/11))
-   CI infrastructure. ([#​3](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/issues/3), [#​6](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/issues/6))
-   CI: add nolintlint linter. ([#​10](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/issues/10))

Changed:

-   Mark some fields with `omitempty` JSON attribute. ([#​9](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/issues/9))
-   Modernize code by using new Go features. ([#​13](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/issues/13))
-   CI: switch to golangci-lint v2. ([#​12](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/issues/12))

Fixed:

-   systemd: write rounded CPU quota to cgroupfs. ([#​4](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/issues/4))

Thanks to the following contributors who made this release possible:

-   Akihiro Suda <akihiro.suda.cz@hco.ntt.co.jp>
-   Hironori Shiina <shiina.hironori@gmail.com>
-   Kir Kolyshkin <kolyshkin@gmail.com>
-   Zou Nengren <zouyee1989@​gmail.com>

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.1...v0.0.2

</details>
